LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays random recommended vehicles for the current lead.

property.name: maxRecords
property.label: Maximum Vehicles to Display
property.description: Used only when custom vehicle fields below are empty

property.name: vehicle1RecordLink
property.label: Vehicle 1 Record Link
property.description: Paste a full record URL, relative URL, or record Id

property.name: vehicle2RecordLink
property.label: Vehicle 2 Record Link
property.description: Paste a full record URL, relative URL, or record Id

property.name: vehicle3RecordLink
property.label: Vehicle 3 Record Link
property.description: Paste a full record URL, relative URL, or record Id
